cURL

cURL

Copy

Ask AI

```
curl --request POST \
  --url https://api.relay.link/currencies/v2 \
  --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  --data '
{
  "defaultList": true,
  "chainIds": [
    123
  ],
  "term": "<string>",
  "address": "<string>",
  "currencyId": "<string>",
  "tokens": [
    "<string>"
  ],
  "verified": true,
  "limit": 20,
  "includeAllChains": true,
  "useExternalSearch": true,
  "depositAddressOnly": true
}
'
```

200

Copy

Ask AI

```
[
  {
    "chainId": 123,
    "address": "<string>",
    "symbol": "<string>",
    "name": "<string>",
    "decimals": 123,
    "vmType": "bvm",
    "metadata": {
      "logoURI": "<string>",
      "verified": true,
      "isNative": true
    }
  }
]
```

API Reference

# Get Currencies

This api returns currency metadata from a curated list

POST

https://api.relay.linkhttps://api.testnets.relay.link

/

currencies

/

v2

Try it

cURL

cURL

Copy

Ask AI

```
curl --request POST \
  --url https://api.relay.link/currencies/v2 \
  --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  --data '
{
  "defaultList": true,
  "chainIds": [
    123
  ],
  "term": "<string>",
  "address": "<string>",
  "currencyId": "<string>",
  "tokens": [
    "<string>"
  ],
  "verified": true,
  "limit": 20,
  "includeAllChains": true,
  "useExternalSearch": true,
  "depositAddressOnly": true
}
'
```

200

Copy

Ask AI

```
[
  {
    "chainId": 123,
    "address": "<string>",
    "symbol": "<string>",
    "name": "<string>",
    "decimals": 123,
    "vmType": "bvm",
    "metadata": {
      "logoURI": "<string>",
      "verified": true,
      "isNative": true
    }
  }
]
```

#### Body

application/json

[​

](#body-default-list)

defaultList

boolean

Return default currencies

[​

](#body-chain-ids)

chainIds

number\[\]

Chain IDs to search for currencies

[​

](#body-term)

term

string

Search term for currencies

[​

](#body-address)

address

string

Address of the currency contract

[​

](#body-currency-id)

currencyId

string

ID to search for a currency

[​

](#body-tokens)

tokens

string\[\]

List of token addresses, like: chainId:address

[​

](#body-verified)

verified

boolean

Filter verified currencies

[​

](#body-limit)

limit

number

default:20

Limit the number of results

Required range: `x <= 100`

[​

](#body-include-all-chains)

includeAllChains

boolean

Include all chains for a currency when filtering by chainId and address

[​

](#body-use-external-search)

useExternalSearch

boolean

Uses 3rd party API's to search for a token, in case relay does not have it indexed

[​

](#body-deposit-address-only)

depositAddressOnly

boolean

Returns only currencies supported with deposit address bridging

#### Response

200 - application/json

List of currencies

[​

](#response-items-chain-id)

chainId

number

[​

](#response-items-address)

address

string

[​

](#response-items-symbol)

symbol

string

[​

](#response-items-name)

name

string

[​

](#response-items-decimals)

decimals

number

[​

](#response-items-vm-type)

vmType

enum<string>

Available options:

`bvm`,

`evm`,

`svm`,

`tvm`,

`tonvm`,

`suivm`,

`hypevm`,

`lvm`

[​

](#response-items-metadata)

metadata

object

Show child attributes
